title: Coral Breeze
subtitle: A Widgy Widget by ElijahCreative
description: Step into the world of Coral Breeze where vintage charm meets modern functionality! Inspired by the refreshing hues of coral reefs, this widget brings you real-time weather with a touch of retro elegance.

title: JU!CE
subtitle: A Widgy Widget by ElijahCreative
description: Meet JU!CE, the weather widget that will quench your thirst for informative forecasts! Sip on a refreshing blend of vibrant orange hues, carefully crafted to brighten up your device's home screen.

title: Minimal 5
subtitle: A Widgy Widget by ElijahCreative
description: Minimal 5 features a multi-colored font style for the time label to show hours and minutes, as well as an info line above it with date/day and sunrise/sunset info. At the bottom, you’ll have your temperature ring with a highlighted dot and the latest Apple news heading.

title: SWA Exclusive
subtitle: A Widgy Widget by TeboulDavid1
description: SWA Exclusive widgy widget. A beautiful dark gradient widget featuring the weather, battery percentage and much more.
